name: Mike Trout
overview: A compact, explosive swing built around balance, controlled load, efficient rotation, and strong connection through contact.

phases.name: Stance + Setup
phases.summary: Athletic posture, controlled hand set, quiet head, and a balanced base before movement begins.

coachingPoints.title: Base
coachingPoints.detail: Feet are under control, allowing force to move into the ground without drifting.

coachingPoints.title: Hands
coachingPoints.detail: Hands are set in a position that reduces unnecessary pre-swing movement.

coachingPoints.title: Posture
coachingPoints.detail: Chest angle and spine position support both adjustability and power.

phases.name: Load + Gather
phases.summary: The body gathers inward while staying centered, preparing the lower half to launch.

coachingPoints.title: Rhythm
coachingPoints.detail: The move is smooth, not rushed, keeping the hitter synced with timing.

coachingPoints.title: Center of Mass
coachingPoints.detail: The gather stays controlled without collapsing or drifting too far back.

coachingPoints.title: Separation
coachingPoints.detail: Upper and lower body begin creating tension that can be released into the swing.

phases.name: Stride + Move Forward
phases.summary: The stride is controlled and directional, helping timing while preserving balance.

coachingPoints.title: Direction
coachingPoints.detail: Front foot lands under control, keeping the move linear and efficient.

coachingPoints.title: Tempo
coachingPoints.detail: The stride works with the pitch, not against it.

phases.name: Launch + Rotation
phases.summary: Lower half begins turning, torso follows, and the barrel enters the zone efficiently.

coachingPoints.title: Hip Rotation
coachingPoints.detail: Hips fire first, helping sequence the swing from ground-up.

coachingPoints.title: Connection
coachingPoints.detail: The body stays connected so the hands and barrel work with the turn.

coachingPoints.title: Bat Path
coachingPoints.detail: The barrel enters the zone early enough to stay through contact.

phases.name: Contact
phases.summary: Stable head, strong front side, and efficient transfer of force into the ball.

coachingPoints.title: Head Stability
coachingPoints.detail: The eyes stay quiet, helping visual accuracy at contact.

coachingPoints.title: Front Side
coachingPoints.detail: Firm front side helps stop linear drift and transfer energy into rotation.

coachingPoints.title: Barrel Accuracy
coachingPoints.detail: The barrel meets the ball with adjustability and authority.

phases.name: Extension + Finish
phases.summary: The swing continues naturally through the zone before decelerating in balance.

coachingPoints.title: Extension
coachingPoints.detail: The hitter releases through the ball instead of cutting the swing off early.

coachingPoints.title: Finish Balance
coachingPoints.detail: Balanced finish suggests good sequence and body control.
